experiment: week-12 day-2: 12B QAT single-GPU load + context-ceiling walk

gpu.name: RTX 3090
gpu.link: PCIe 3.0 x1 (irrelevant: single-GPU TP=1, no inter-GPU traffic)

source_patch.description: 3-line verbatim backport of upstream main's prefix-threading fix for the encoder-free vision embedder; without it, patch_dense reports an empty layer name, never matches the checkpoint's compressed-tensors ignore list, and is constructed packed while the checkpoint ships it bf16 (shape mismatch at weight load)
source_patch.retire_when: week-13 version convergence lands on an image containing the upstream fix

mandatory_hf_overrides.vision_config.num_soft_tokens: 256 (inert placeholder; MM-budget code reads a field absent from checkpoint config)
mandatory_hf_overrides.quantization_config: checkpoint's config.json quantization_config restated VERBATIM with regex ignore entries appended; --hf-overrides does a SHALLOW REPLACE, so a partial override silently drops quant_method and the model constructs as ~24 GB bf16 (root cause of the Day 1 OOM)

held_constant.attention_backend: TRITON_ATTN (forced: heterogeneous head dims, head_dim=256 SWA / global_head_dim=512)
held_constant.max_num_batched_tokens: 2496 (image auto-raise for prefix-LM video budget; not overridden)

launch_attempts.config_delta: --enforce-eager added to Day 1 config (Day 1 partial quantization_config override still in place)
launch_attempts.detail: identical to Day 1: 22.85 GiB allocated by PyTorch, died allocating 1.88 GiB for lm_head during weight construction; engine config line revealed quantization=None
launch_attempts.finding: eager-fixes-load hypothesis FALSIFIED (compile/capture happen after weight load); real cause exposed: model constructing unquantized bf16 (~24 GB) because the Day 1 hf-override shallow-replaced quantization_config and dropped quant_method

launch_attempts.detail: MarlinLinearKernel active, checkpoint 9.56 GiB, construction completed; ValueError: checkpoint ships vision_embedder.patch_dense.weight (bf16, on ignore list) but module constructed packed (weight_packed/weight_scale/weight_shape)
launch_attempts.finding: image's gemma4_unified.py constructs patch_dense without a prefix argument -> empty layer name -> ignore list can never match; genuine vLLM bug, fixed in upstream main

launch_attempts.config_delta: 3-line upstream prefix backport mounted over image file
launch_attempts.detail: weights 8.28 GiB (eager run; < 9.56 GiB on-disk checkpoint, consistent with weight tying)

eager.decode_note: floor; probes 167 tok / 2.423 s and 2.422 s (replicated); first probe 4.124 s excluded as Triton-JIT cold-start artifact

cudagraphs.decode_note: probes 164 tok / 2.095 s and 166 tok / 2.134 s (replicated); first probe 2.974 s excluded as JIT warmup
cudagraphs.prediction_miss: predicted 90-110 tok/s from launch-overhead removal; actual gap dominated by kernel quality (TRITON_ATTN, Marlin dequant, bf16 lm_head), which graphs do not touch

context_ceiling_walk.config: cudagraphs on, util 0.90, all else held constant; one relaunch per rung

two_coefficient_fit.mechanism: SWA layers hold KV only for a fixed window per sequence; global layers hold KV for the full sequence; average per-token cost therefore falls with sequence length

findings: KV pool is MML-insensitive on this build (flat 11.0 GiB across 8x MML range) — contrasts with pool-grows-with-MML on v0.21.0 (Week 11); engine-version-dependent
model is KV-unconstrained across its entire defined context range on a single 24 GB card: full 262,144 architectural context fits at 2.16x concurrency
fp8-KV lever and PP=2 fallback both unneeded
recipe's 131072 pin is NOT a memory constraint on this hardware; likely quality-validation boundary (unverified)

functional_verification.placement: single process on GPU-a7370cb3 confirmed via nvidia-smi --query-compute-apps uuid-join
functional_verification.probe_method: chat completion, ~150-word factual prompt, unique nonce per request (defeats prefix caching), temperature 0, max_tokens 256; first probe per boot discarded as JIT warmup
functional_verification.scope_limit: probes verify the configuration is functional at short context; long-sequence behavior (100K+ prefill, decode at depth, output quality) untested

open_items: production MML choice for the sub-agent worker (workload/quality decision; memory permits up to 262144)
parked levers: zero video modality (reclaim 2496-token encoder budget), KV-tax recovery env (~0.79 GiB), fp8 KV cache (verify SM 8.6 support first)
week-13: version convergence, retire source patch, 31B re-baseline
